p.c: function[T0, T2: Monoid](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or T2.1 = list_monoid_fold[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[T, A](List.nil[T], f)

function[T0, T4: Monoid](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0 -> T4) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x3(x0) * list_monoid_fold[T0, T4](x1, x3) = list_monoid_fold[T0, T4](x2, x3) }[T, A](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), f)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or x0 + x1 = x1 }[T](List.nil[T], right)
function[T0, T2: Monoid](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or T2.1 = list_monoid_fold[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[T, A](List.nil[T], f)

goal: A.1 * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[A](list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f))
function(x0: List[T]) { list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0 + right, f) = p(x0) }(List.nil[T])
not p(List.nil[T]) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T], f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T] + right, f)
list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T], f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) != list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T] + right, f) or p(List.nil[T])

goal: List.cons(head, tail) + right = List.cons(head, tail + right)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or List.cons[T0](x0, x1 + x3) = x2 + x3 }[T](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), right)

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail + right), f) = f(head) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail + right, f)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: List[T1]) { x0(x1) * list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](x2, x0) = list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](List.cons[T1](x1, x2), x0) }[A, T](f, head, tail + right)

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail + right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f)

p.c: function(x0: List[T]) { list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0 + right, f) = p(x0) }(tail)
not p(tail) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail + right, f)

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail + right), f) = f(head) * (list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f))
f(head) * (list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f)) = f(head) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f)

p.c: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[A](f(head), list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f), list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f))

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) = f(head) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: List[T1]) { x0(x1) * list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](x2, x0) = list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](List.cons[T1](x1, x2), x0) }[A, T](f, head, tail)

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail) + right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f)

p.c: function(x0: List[T]) { list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0 + right, f) = p(x0) }(List.cons(head, tail))
not p(List.cons(head, tail)) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail) + right, f)
list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) != list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail) + right, f) or p(List.cons(head, tail))
not forall(x0: T, x1: List[T]) { not p(x1) or p(List.cons(x0, x1)) } or forall(x2: List[T]) { p(x2) } = true
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or forall(x0: List[T]) { p(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: List[T]) { not forall(x1: T, x2: List[T]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) })
function(x0: List[T]) { not forall(x1: T, x2: List[T]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) }(l)
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or p(l)
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) }
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: List[T]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
let w1: List[T] satisfy { p(w1) and not p(List.cons(w0, w1)) }
p(w1)
not p(List.cons(w0, w1))
let w2: List[T] satisfy { p(w2) and not p(List.cons(w0, w2)) }
p(w2)
not p(List.cons(w0, w2))
function(x0: List[T], x1: T) { not p(x0) or p(List.cons(x1, x0)) }(w2, w0)
function(x0: List[T]) { p(x0) }(left)
function(x0: List[T]) { list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0 + right, f) = p(x0) }(left)
not p(left) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](left, f) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](right, f) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](left + right, f)
function[T0](x0: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, List.nil[T0]) = List.singleton[T0](x0) }[T](x)

goal: list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(x, List.nil[T]), f) = f(x) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T], f)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: List[T1]) { x0(x1) * list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](x2, x0) = list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](List.cons[T1](x1, x2), x0) }[A, T](f, x, List.nil[T])
function[T0, T2: Monoid](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or T2.1 = list_monoid_fold[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[T, A](List.nil[T], f)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[A](f(x))
function[T0, T2: Monoid](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or T2.1 = list_monoid_fold[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[T, A](List.nil[T], f)
function(x0: List[T]) { h(x0) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) = p(x0) }(List.nil[T])
not p(List.nil[T]) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T], f) = h(List.nil[T])
list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.nil[T], f) != h(List.nil[T]) or p(List.nil[T])
function(x0: T) { forall(x1: List[T]) { h(List.cons(x0, x1)) = f(x0) * h(x1) } = true }(head)
function(x0: T, x1: List[T]) { f(x0) * h(x1) = h(List.cons(x0, x1)) }(head, tail)
function(x0: List[T]) { h(x0) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) = p(x0) }(tail)
not p(tail) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f) = h(tail)

goal: f(head) * h(tail) = f(head) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f)
list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) = f(head) * list_monoid_fold[T, A](tail, f)

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: List[T1]) { x0(x1) * list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](x2, x0) = list_monoid_fold[T1, T0](List.cons[T1](x1, x2), x0) }[A, T](f, head, tail)

goal: h(List.cons(head, tail)) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f)

p.c: function(x0: List[T]) { h(x0) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) = p(x0) }(List.cons(head, tail))
not p(List.cons(head, tail)) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) = h(List.cons(head, tail))
list_monoid_fold[T, A](List.cons(head, tail), f) != h(List.cons(head, tail)) or p(List.cons(head, tail))
not forall(x0: T, x1: List[T]) { not p(x1) or p(List.cons(x0, x1)) } or forall(x2: List[T]) { p(x2) } = true
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or forall(x0: List[T]) { p(x0) } = true
(forall(x0: List[T]) { not forall(x1: T, x2: List[T]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) })
function(x0: List[T]) { not forall(x1: T, x2: List[T]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or p(x0) }(l)
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } or p(l)
exists(k0: T, k1: List[T]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) }
let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: List[T]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
let w1: List[T] satisfy { p(w1) and not p(List.cons(w0, w1)) }
p(w1)
not p(List.cons(w0, w1))
let w2: List[T] satisfy { p(w2) and not p(List.cons(w0, w2)) }
p(w2)
not p(List.cons(w0, w2))
function(x0: List[T], x1: T) { not p(x0) or p(List.cons(x1, x0)) }(w2, w0)
function(x0: List[T]) { p(x0) }(xs)
function(x0: List[T]) { h(x0) = list_monoid_fold[T, A](x0, f) = p(x0) }(xs)
not p(xs) or list_monoid_fold[T, A](xs, f) = h(xs)
function[T0, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: List[T0]) { list_monoid_fold_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1) = list_monoid_fold[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[T, A](f, xs)
